Rule: Respect all teachers, staff, and classmates at all times.
Use polite and appropriate language in school.
Arrive to school and all classes on time.
Attend school regularly and avoid unnecessary absences.
Follow the official school dress code or uniform.
Keep personal appearance clean and appropriate.
Bring all required materials to class.
Complete all homework on time.
Participate actively during lessons.
Listen carefully when teachers or classmates are speaking.
Do not interrupt others during class discussions.
Follow all teacher instructions without argument.
Do not cheat or copy during exams or assignments.
Avoid plagiarism by doing your own work.
Use electronic devices only when allowed.
Keep phones silent or turned off during class.
Do not use devices for non-educational purposes.
Maintain cleanliness in classrooms and hallways.
Do not litter; use trash bins properly.
Take care of school furniture and equipment.
Report any damage to school property immediately.
Avoid running or unsafe behavior in corridors.
Follow all safety rules during school activities.
Respect school property and surroundings.
Be kind and supportive to classmates.
Do not bully, tease, or harass others.
Respect differences among students.
Ask for permission before leaving the classroom.
Use school facilities responsibly.
Keep noise levels appropriate during class.
Line up properly when required.
Follow rules during recess and breaks.
Do not bring prohibited items to school.
Respect school schedules and timetables.
Complete assigned tasks within deadlines.
Keep notebooks and materials organized.
Cooperate with group work and team activities.
Accept feedback from teachers positively.
Communicate respectfully with all staff members.
Report any problems or concerns to a teacher.
Follow instructions during emergencies.
Respect school policies at all times.
Avoid damaging or misusing school resources.
Be honest in all school-related matters.
Show responsibility for your actions.
Help maintain a positive school environment.
Respect quiet zones such as libraries.
Follow computer lab and library rules.
Represent the school positively at all times.
Strive to do your best academically and behaviorally.
